hero.title: About AFAQ
hero.subtitle: Discover our story, mission, and what makes us unique.

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: AFAQ Scientific Club was founded by a group of passionate students at the University of Akli Mohand Oulhadj in Bouira, driven by a shared vision to create a space where technology and creativity intersect.
story.paragraph2: The name 'AFAQ' comes from the Arabic word 'آفاق', meaning 'bright future' or 'horizons' — reflecting our commitment to exploring new frontiers in science and technology.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To empower students with practical skills in technology and electronics, foster innovation and teamwork, and create a vibrant community of future engineers and creators.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: To become a leading student club that inspires technological innovation and prepares students for the challenges of tomorrow.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.desc: We encourage creative thinking and novel solutions.

teamwork.title: Teamwork
teamwork.desc: We believe in the power of collaboration and shared knowledge.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.desc: We strive for the highest quality in everything we do.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.desc: We act with honesty, transparency, and respect.

special.title: What Makes AFAQ Special
items: Access to a fully equipped electronics and coding lab
A welcoming community for all skill levels
special.point1: Hands-on learning approach with real projects
special.point3: Strong connection with industry and alumni
